arxiv.pdf_endpoint_status: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2607.12085v1 returned HTTP 404 after retries during acquisition on 2026-07-15; no file was preserved or represented as an arXiv PDF.
arxiv.title: Operationalising Multi-Dimensional Evaluation for Conversational Agents: A Scalable, Governed Pipeline with Selective Re-evaluation and Model Benchmarking

paper.extraction_method: Python standard-library HTMLParser over the complete immutable arXiv HTML, with script, style, and navigation blocks omitted and whitespace normalized
paper.verification: Extraction is readable from title and abstract through Sections 1-8 and all 20 references. Required section headings and reference [20] were found; no NUL bytes or Unicode replacement characters were present. This is full-text acquisition and extraction verification, not a deep review.

release.official_release_status: No author-owned code, data, configuration, annotation guide, or official project repository was linked from the immutable arXiv HTML. Exact-title/arXiv-ID web searches and a GitHub repository API search found no official release during acquisition. Generic arXiv/LaTeXML GitHub links were excluded. Absence is provisional, not proof that no artifact exists.
